summary: DevOps Engineer with 7 years of experience on AWS, Azure, and GCP. Built and maintained Kubernetes clusters, Terraform infrastructure, and CI/CD pipelines at Jack Henry (fintech) and Akuna Capital (trading). Holds CKA, CKAD, and Terraform Associate certifications. Green Card holder.

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained multi-region Kubernetes clusters with Helm charts for a financial services platform, handling zero-downtime deployments and pod lifecycle management
Designed Terraform infrastructure using reusable modules, remote state backends, and workspaces to manage AWS and Azure environments consistently across dev, staging, and prod
Built CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD using GitOps, reducing the release cycle from weekly to daily with no increase in incidents
Set up HashiCorp Vault for secrets management with RBAC and automated secret rotation across all Kubernetes workloads
Deployed Datadog, Prometheus, and Grafana for full-stack observability: set up dashboards, alert routing, and runbooks that cut mean time to resolution on production incidents
Integrated Trivy container scanning and Kubernetes RBAC policies into CI/CD to maintain SOC 2 and PCI DSS compliance
Implemented Velero for Kubernetes backup and disaster recovery, tested restore procedures across three environments
Administered MongoDB Atlas clusters including replica sets, index optimization, and automated backups for high-traffic applications

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained Terraform modules for the SAP email service on AWS, managing VPCs, ECS clusters, and RDS instances as code
Deployed fault-tolerant Kubernetes clusters on Gardener, AWS, and GCP across multiple regions with automated failover
Set up ArgoCD for GitOps-based continuous delivery, cutting deployment lead time and removing manual release steps
Configured full AWS email infrastructure (SES, SNS, S3, Lambda) with centralized log aggregation in Sumo Logic
Used Pulumi with Python for infrastructure automation where team requirements did not allow Terraform
Built and maintained Helm charts for all Kubernetes applications, standardizing deployment configuration across teams
Added Trivy container scanning to CI pipelines and ran remediation cycles to keep vulnerability counts near zero
Trained an external team of 5 on Terraform and Ansible, getting them from manual provisioning to full IaC in 3 months

experience.title: Cloud Engineer
bullets: Deployed and scaled Docker containers across Kubernetes namespaces for a high-frequency trading platform, managing resource limits and pod scheduling
Built AWS network infrastructure with Terraform — VPCs, subnets, security groups, and load balancers managed entirely as code
Set up Prometheus and Grafana on Kubernetes with custom dashboards for application latency, error rate, and infrastructure metrics
Managed IAM roles and policies across AWS accounts, enforced least-privilege access for all workloads and engineers
Maintained AWS infrastructure including patching, backup schedules, and high-availability configurations for trading systems
Handled GitHub repository structure, branch protection rules, and access permissions across multiple engineering teams
Performed Linux system administration — OS patching, performance tuning, and troubleshooting on RedHat and CentOS servers

certifications: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Foundations Certified Associate
